title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Sprinters Stakes. The race
opens with...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An all-star video proposed by Curren Chan! The
crowd's reaction rivals that of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The special opening video stars Hishi Akebono,
Taiki Shuttle, and Sakura Bakushin O, whose
combined cuteness doubles the excitement!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the showdown for the top. Not even
Curren Chan can hide her nervousness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I encourage her with the most important words
she can hear—that she's the cutest—and she
heads off to the race beaming.
